small-intro: Software developer from Manaus and chemical engineer by training, I am passionate about learning new technologies and building solid and friendly systems. I always seek excellence and innovation in each project. Ah, and I can't forget to mention: I'm crazy about x-caboquinho and tambaqui!
small-description-text: Here are some of the selected projects that demonstrate my passion for software development.
Convolutional neural network (CNN) appli: Convolutional neural network (CNN) applied to the Reynolds experiment
It was my bachelor of chemical engineeri: It was my bachelor of chemical engineering final project
im-developer-fullstack: I am a software developer based in Brazil. Has Chemistry Engineering background.
short-text-about-me: I am a modern alchemist of code lines, residing in the heart of the Amazon, in Manaus. My journey began in Chemical Engineering, where I learned to transform elements and processes, and now I am finishing a technologist in Systems Analysis and Development, with a postgraduate degree in Software Engineering. My mission is to merge scientific precision with the art of programming, creating innovative and sustainable solutions in the world of technology.
